heading: Criteria for funding environmental infrastructure projects
label: 2341c Criteria for funding environmental infrastructure projects
notes: CodificationSection was enacted as part of the Water Resources Development Act of 2020, and not as part of the Water Resources Development Act of 1986 which comprises this chapter.
“Secretary” DefinedSecretary means the Secretary of the Army, see , set out as a note under .section 2 of div. AA of Pub. L. 116–260section 2201 of this title
DefinitionsFor definition of “economically disadvantaged community” as used in this section, see , set out as a note under .section 160 of div. AA of Pub. L. 116–260section 2201 of this title

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: Not later than 180 days after , the Secretary shall develop specific criteria for the evaluation and ranking of individual environmental assistance projects authorized by Congress (including projects authorized pursuant to environmental assistance programs) for the Secretary to carry out.December 27, 2020

children.label: A
children.text: the benefits of the project to the local economy;

children.label: B
children.text: the extent to which the project will enhance local development;

children.label: C
children.text: the number of jobs that will be directly created by the project; and

children.label: D
children.text: the ability of the non-Federal interest to pay the applicable non-Federal share of the cost of the project;

children.label: B
children.text: an economically disadvantaged community, including an economically disadvantaged minority community;
the amount of appropriations a project has received;
the funding capability of the Corps of Engineers with respect to the project;
whether the project could be carried out under other Federal authorities at an equivalent cost to the non-Federal interest; and
any other criteria that the Secretary considers to be appropriate.

children.heading: Inclusion in guidance
children.label: c Inclusion in guidance
children.text: The Secretary shall include the criteria developed under subsection (a) in the annual Civil Works Direct Program Development Policy Guidance of the Secretary.

children.heading: Report to Congress
children.label: d Report to Congress
children.text: For fiscal year 2022, and biennially thereafter, in conjunction with the President’s annual budget submission to Congress under , the Secretary shall submit to the Committee on Environment and Public Works and the Committee on Appropriations of the Senate and the Committee on Transportation and Infrastructure and the Committee on Appropriations of the House of Representatives a report that identifies the Secretary’s ranking of individual environmental assistance projects authorized by Congress for the Secretary to carry out, in accordance with the criteria developed under this section.section 1105(a) of title 31
